description:
The package `libpng` version `2:1.6.34-5.el8` was detected in `YUM/DNF package manager` on a machine running `CentOS 8.2.2004` is vulnerable to `CVE-2026-25646`, which exists in `all current versions`.

The vulnerability was found in the [Official RedHat Security Advisories](https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-25646) with vendor severity: `High` (awaiting NVD analysis, [CNA](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-25646) severity: `High`).

This vulnerability has a known exploit available. Source: [VulnCheck](https://github.com/pnggroup/libpng/security/advisories/GHSA-g8hp-mq4h-rqm3).

This vulnerability cannot be remediated because a fix has not been released.
